credits.consentText: I have customer's consent to receive WhatsApp messages

toasts.notEnoughStock: Not enough stock. Only {qty} units available.
toasts.productLimitReached: Free plan limited to 10 products. Upgrade to add unlimited products.
toasts.upgradeRequired: This feature requires Starter or Business plan.

page.title: Payment setup
page.subtitle: Set up how you receive money from sales.

bank.title: Set up your bank account
bank.subtitle: Tell us where to send your earnings.

tierLocked.title: Online payments
tierLocked.subtitle: Available on Starter and Pro plans. Upgrade to start receiving payments through Paystack.

kyc.title: Verify your identity
kyc.subtitle: We'll need a few details to comply with regulations.

tierLocked.title: Verify your identity
tierLocked.subtitle: Required before receiving online payments. Available on Starter and Pro plans.

notStarted.title: Verify your identity
notStarted.subtitle: Required by Nigerian banking rules before receiving online payments. Takes about 5 minutes.

pending.title: We're checking your details
pending.primaryLine: We'll let you know within 24-48 hours. You don't need to wait on this screen.

needsReview.title: Your account needs review
needsReview.primaryLine: We need to take another look at your business details.
needsReview.bullet1: Photo of your CAC certificate (if registered)
needsReview.bullet3: Brief description of what your business does
needsReview.secondaryLine: We'll get back to you within 2 business days.

approved.title: Identity verified ✓
approved.primaryLine: You can receive online payments through your Storehouse.

intro.heading: Verify your identity
intro.help: Nigerian banking rules require us to verify your identity before you can receive online payments. This takes about 5 minutes.

step1.heading: Your personal details
step1.help: We'll verify these against the bank account you set up.

errors.phoneDigitsOnly: Phone number must be digits only
errors.phoneLength: Phone number must be 10 digits after +234

step2.heading: About your business
step2.help: Tell us a bit about what you sell.

step3.heading: Take a photo with your ID
step3.help: Hold your ID card next to your face so both are clearly visible.
step3.takeHelp: Tap to open your camera. Hold your ID next to your face.

errors.heicNotSupported: We need a JPEG or PNG. Please retake with your camera (not gallery).
errors.invalidFormat: Photo must be a JPEG or PNG.
errors.notSignedIn: Please sign in again and try.
errors.uploadFailed: Couldn't upload photo. Tap Continue to try again.

step4.heading: Review and submit
step4.help: Check your details before we send them for review.
step4.confirmation: I confirm I am the legal owner/operator of this business and the information provided is accurate.

errors.confirmationRequired: Please tick the confirmation box to submit.
errors.invalidBvnFormat: Your BVN format isn't right. Go back and check it.
errors.invalidNinFormat: Your NIN format isn't right. Go back and check it.
errors.bvnNinIdentical: Your BVN and NIN can't be the same.
errors.invalidPhoneFormat: Your phone number format isn't right.
errors.accountFrozen: Your account needs review. Please email support@storehouse.ng.
errors.maxResubmissionsExceeded: You've reached the maximum number of submissions. Please email support@storehouse.ng.
errors.unauthorized: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.generic: Couldn't submit. Please check your connection and try again.

success.heading: Submitted ✓
success.help: We'll let you know within 24-48 hours.

errors.heading: Something went wrong
errors.storeLoadFailed: We couldn't load your store details. Please try again.

step1.heading: What's your business called?
step1.help: This is the name that will show on your payment receipts.

step2.heading: Which bank should we send your earnings to?

step3.heading: Enter your account number
step3.helpWithBank: We'll check this matches a real account at {bank}.
step3.tooShort: Account number should be 10 digits. You entered {n}.
step3.notFoundBody: We checked {bank} and didn't find an account ending in {last4}. Double-check the number and the bank, then try again.
step3.networkBody: Check your internet connection and try again.
step3.comingSoonBody: We'll let you know when it's available.

step4.heading: Check everything looks right
step4.summary: We'll send your earnings to {bank} account {account} ({name}) after every sale.
step4.toastNetwork: Couldn't reach our servers. Check your internet and try again.
step4.toastGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

step4_5.heading: Coming soon
step4_5.body: Bank account setup is coming soon. We're putting the finishing touches on this feature. We'll send you a message as soon as it's ready, and you can come back here to finish setting up.

step5.heading: All done!
step5.body: Your bank account is set up. We'll send your earnings to {bank} account {account} ({name}) after every sale.
step5.next: Next: verify your identity — coming soon.
